text: SimpleITK is a C++ API, created to make it easier to leverage Insight Toolkit in rapid prototyping, learning and scientific research activities through higher level programming languages. ITK (Insight Toolkit) is a free, open-source software library used in various fields of science and engineering such as image processing, image segmentation, scientific visualization, robotic vision, flexible and automation applications in a research as well as clinical environment, medical exploration, visualization, diagnostics and treatments. The library was built to be highly generic, flexible, and extendable and implemented primarily in templated C++. A large part of the ITK infrastructure and many useful processing tools and tools applications were implemented with the assumption of using a templated C++ interface. To provide interfaces to high-level programming languages, such as Python and Tcl, a small ancillary system, WrapITK, was implemented to give direct access to the most of the library in terms of language bindings. SimpleITK has departed from this concept. The system is designed to take full advantage of the algorithm library created for C++ without passing through complex to define and to use code wrapped interfaces to high-level languages, whereas in WrapITK interfaces define themselves directly the underlying implementation wrapped code. Our design target for ease of use led us to put abstraction facade levels between the implementation filters for which descriptions are created via the manual process described in Code generation which describe functionality to be applied with C++ meta-programming concepts to finally arrive at an easy to use API around the power provided through ITK by SimpleITK. SimpleITK is an open source software library released under the permissive Apache License Version 2.0 and can be downloaded from our web site at http://www.simpleitk.org.
headline: Fully Human Written
